description_long: This is a modern solid-body electric guitar with a sleek, contoured body finished in a vibrant red color. The front features two humbucker pickups, a bridge, control knobs, and a pickup selector switch, all in black, contrasting with the red body. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, and extends to a black headstock with six inline tuning pegs. The back of the guitar reveals a black electronics cavity cover and a tremolo spring cover, with ergonomic cutaways for player comfort. The body has deep double cutaways, allowing easy access to the higher frets. The overall design is streamlined and built for performance, typical of guitars used in rock or metal genres.
description: A sleek, red solid-body electric guitar with black hardware, double cutaways, and a maple neck. It features two humbucker pickups and a modern, contoured design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red body, two black humbucker pickups, bridge, control knobs, and the full maple neck with a black headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body depth and the transition from the red body to the maple neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black electronics cavity cover, tremolo spring cover, and ergonomic body contours.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the consistent slimness of the body and the edge of the hardware.
attribute_headstock_design: Black, angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs and no visible logo
